mapper.sql: StockCode, CustomerNo, StockName, UpdTime, ContractNo, ShortAddress, AddressID, Discount, DeptNo, CreateTime, DeptNos, TotalModelCount, UnExpModelCount, BeginDate, Email, Status, ExportType, AutoExport, Address, ContactPsn, ContactTel, StockId, MaxCaseNo, ProvinceCode, postcode
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._AgentStock_GZ
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._AgentStock_GZ (StockCode, CustomerNo, StockName, UpdTime, ContractNo, ShortAddress, AddressID, Discount, DeptNo, CreateTime, DeptNos, TotalModelCount, UnExpModelCount, BeginDate, Email, Status, ExportType, AutoExport, Address, ContactPsn, ContactTel, StockId, MaxCaseNo, ProvinceCode, postcode) values (#{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{addressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{discount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deptnos,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalmodelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unexpmodelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{begindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{exporttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{autoexport,jdbcType=BIT}, #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{contacttel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxcaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo._AgentStock_GZ
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockName = #{record.stockname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
UpdTime = #{record.updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShortAddress = #{record.shortaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
AddressID = #{record.addressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DeptNos = #{record.deptnos,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TotalModelCount = #{record.totalmodelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
UnExpModelCount = #{record.unexpmodelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
BeginDate = #{record.begindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ExportType = #{record.exporttype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
AutoExport = #{record.autoexport,jdbcType=BIT},
Address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContactTel = #{record.contacttel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
StockId = #{record.stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MaxCaseNo = #{record.maxcaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProvinceCode = #{record.provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._AgentStock_GZ set StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, StockName = #{record.stockname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, UpdTime = #{record.updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ShortAddress = #{record.shortaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, AddressID = #{record.addressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DeptNos = #{record.deptnos,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TotalModelCount = #{record.totalmodelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, UnExpModelCount = #{record.unexpmodelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, BeginDate = #{record.begindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, ExportType = #{record.exporttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, AutoExport = #{record.autoexport,jdbcType=BIT}, Address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ContactTel = #{record.contacttel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, StockId = #{record.stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MaxCaseNo = #{record.maxcaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProvinceCode = #{record.provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
